questions.question: Is this a single-campus or multi-campus institution? Multi-campus typically requires a campus model linked to the institution.
questions.context: Multi-campus adds uni.campus model with Many2one to uni.institution and affects module partitioning via multi_company

questions.question: How is your academic calendar structured? This defines the time-based hierarchy for enrollment, fees, and exams.
questions.context: Academic year/term models are referenced by nearly every other module (fee periods, exam schedules, enrollment windows)

questions.question: How are departments organized? Flat list or hierarchical (faculty -> department -> sub-department)?
questions.context: Hierarchical uses parent_id self-referential Many2one on uni.department with child_ids One2many

questions.question: What is the academic program structure? Program -> Course, or Program -> Semester -> Course, or deeper nesting?
questions.context: Deeper nesting requires intermediate models but gives finer control over prerequisites and credit distribution

questions.question: Should entity codes (student IDs, program codes, course codes) be auto-generated via ir.sequence or manually entered?
questions.context: Auto-generation uses ir.sequence with configurable prefixes and padding; hybrid allows override of auto-generated values

questions.question: If multi-campus, should each campus be a separate Odoo company (res.company) for financial isolation?
questions.context: Separate companies enable per-campus accounting and security rules but add complexity to cross-campus reporting

questions.question: What base security groups are needed beyond admin? Common roles: registrar, dean, HOD, academic coordinator.
questions.context: Groups defined in core are inherited by all other modules via implied_ids; keep core groups minimal and domain-neutral

questions.question: Should each module have its own top-level menu, or should all modules nest under a single 'University' root menu?
questions.context: Single root keeps navigation clean; per-module root is standard Odoo pattern but creates many top-level entries

questions.question: What numbering format for sequences? e.g., STU/2024/00001 or plain numeric 00001?
questions.context: Prefixed with year resets annually via ir.sequence date_range; configure prefix per entity in core settings

questions.question: What localization hooks are needed? Country-specific date formats, currency, regulatory requirements?
questions.context: Localization affects currency fields (monetary vs float), date display, and compliance reporting across all modules

context_hints: Check config.json for multi_company setting
Core models are imported by every other module -- keep minimal
Academic year/term structure cascades to fee periods and exam schedules

questions.question: What enrollment lifecycle states do you need? Standard: applied -> admitted -> enrolled -> graduated -> withdrawn.
questions.context: States drive workflow transitions via Odoo's state field with statusbar_widget; custom states need explicit transition rules

questions.question: What types of academic holds should block enrollment or results? Common: financial, disciplinary, academic probation.
questions.context: Holds are typically a separate model with Many2one to student and type selection field; checked in enrollment constraints

questions.question: What student documents need management? Upload types, verification workflow, and storage approach.
questions.context: Documents use ir.attachment with a wrapper model for metadata (type, verification_status, expiry_date)

questions.question: How should student IDs be generated? Auto-sequence, year-based prefix, or program-based prefix?
questions.context: Uses ir.sequence with date_range for year-based; program-based needs dynamic prefix from program code

questions.question: Do you need guardian/parent tracking linked to students? This enables parent portal and emergency contacts.
questions.context: Guardian is a separate model (or res.partner category) with Many2many to student; enables portal access and notification routing

questions.question: Do you need student photograph storage and/or biometric integration for attendance?
questions.context: Photos stored as Binary field with image widget; biometric needs external device integration via API

questions.question: How should inter-program or inter-campus transfers be handled?
questions.context: Transfer workflow creates a request record with approval chain; updates enrollment and recalculates fee obligations

questions.question: Do you need alumni tracking after graduation? Includes employment status, contact updates, and alumni events.
questions.context: Alumni is typically a graduated student state with additional fields; can be a separate model or state extension

questions.question: How are students grouped for academic operations? Batch (intake year), section (class division), or both?
questions.context: Batch groups by intake year; sections divide within a batch for timetabling and capacity management

questions.question: What self-service features should students access via the portal? View grades, pay fees, download documents?
questions.context: Portal access controlled via res.groups and website.published fields; each feature needs explicit portal controller

context_hints: Check decomposition.json for student model list and dependencies
Student is typically the most connected module -- referenced by fee, exam, timetable, notification
Enrollment states affect fee calculation triggers and exam eligibility

questions.question: Will fee amounts use Odoo's monetary field (currency-aware) or plain float?
questions.context: Monetary fields auto-handle currency conversion and rounding; requires currency_id field on the model

questions.question: How should late payment penalties be calculated?
questions.context: Tiered allows different rates for different overdue periods (e.g., 5% first month, 10% after)

questions.question: What payment channels should be supported?
questions.context: Gateway integration uses Odoo's payment.provider framework; bank uses account.journal reconciliation

questions.question: Do you need configurable installment plans for fee payments?
questions.context: Installments create scheduled payment lines linked to the fee structure; each installment generates a separate invoice

questions.question: Should fee structures be defined per program, per department, or globally?
questions.context: Per-program links fee.structure to uni.program via Many2one; hierarchical allows override at lower levels

questions.question: How should scholarships and fee concessions be handled?
questions.context: Separate scholarship model allows tracking, approval workflow, and reporting independent of fee calculation

questions.question: What refund policy applies when students withdraw? Time-based sliding scale or fixed rules?
questions.context: Sliding scale uses date ranges (100% first week, 75% first month, etc.); creates credit note via account.move reversal

questions.question: Should fee invoices integrate with Odoo accounting (account.move) for full journal entries?
questions.context: Full integration creates account.move records with proper debit/credit; simplified only tracks payment status

questions.question: Do you need printable fee receipts? QWeb PDF or plain text?
questions.context: QWeb PDF uses ir.actions.report with custom template; supports letterhead, signatures, and QR codes

questions.question: What fee components do you need? Common: tuition, lab fees, activity fees, hostel, transport.
questions.context: Fee components are selection field values or a separate model; each component can have different calculation rules

context_hints: Check config.json for localization (pk/sa/ae affects currency)
Check if multi_company affects fee structure separation
Fee module typically depends on core (program) and student (enrollment)

questions.question: What grading system will be used? GPA (4.0/5.0), percentage, letter grades, or multiple scales?
questions.context: Multiple scales allow different programs to use different systems; requires a grading.scale model with conversion tables

questions.question: What is the policy for makeup and re-examination? Automatic eligibility or approval-based?
questions.context: Approval-based creates a re-exam request with workflow; automatic checks grade threshold and auto-enrolls

questions.question: How are final grades computed? Weighted average of components, simple average, or best-of-N?
questions.context: Weighted average uses exam.component model with weight field; computed fields aggregate component marks

questions.question: What is the result publishing workflow? Draft -> verified -> published, or simpler?
questions.context: Three-stage workflow allows double-checking before portal visibility; uses state field with group-based transitions

questions.question: What exam types are needed? Midterm, final, quiz, assignment, practical, viva?
questions.context: Exam types are selection field values on exam.exam model; each type can have different weight in grade computation

questions.question: Do you need automated seating plan generation for exams?
questions.context: Automated seating uses room capacity and student count with randomization; complex constraint satisfaction problem

questions.question: Do you need date sheet (exam schedule) management with conflict detection?
questions.context: Conflict detection checks student course overlap to prevent same-day exams; uses SQL query on enrollment data

questions.question: Do you need hall ticket (admit card) generation for exams?
questions.context: QWeb report with student photo, seat number, exam schedule; requires attendance/fee clearance checks

questions.question: Do you need external examiner support for result moderation?
questions.context: External examiner adds a review step in result publishing; examiner is a res.partner with specific portal access

questions.question: How should marks be entered? Single entry, double-blind (two independent entries), or import from file?
questions.context: Double-blind requires two independent mark entries with discrepancy resolution; prevents data entry errors

context_hints: Check if core module defines academic terms -- exam schedules align to terms
Grade computation is the most compute-intensive operation -- consider stored computed fields
Result publishing triggers notifications if notification module exists

questions.question: How should faculty workload be tracked? Credit hours taught, contact hours, or both?
questions.context: Credit hours link to course credits; contact hours track actual classroom time; both enables workload vs allocation comparison

questions.question: Should faculty leave integrate with Odoo HR leave management (hr.leave)?
questions.context: Full integration inherits hr.leave allocation and approval workflow; simplified only tracks academic-relevant absences

questions.question: What performance evaluation method is needed? Student feedback, peer review, self-assessment, or combined?
questions.context: Student feedback uses a survey model linked to course+faculty; results aggregate per semester for review

questions.question: What is the designation hierarchy? Lecturer -> Assistant Prof -> Associate Prof -> Professor, or custom?
questions.context: Designations are selection field values or a separate model; affects pay scale and workload norms

questions.question: Do you need to track faculty specialization areas for course allocation matching?
questions.context: Specializations are Many2many tags on faculty; used by timetable module for course-faculty matching

questions.question: Do you need a research profile section? Publications, grants, supervisions?
questions.context: Research profile adds One2many lines for publications and grants; useful for university ranking data

questions.question: How are teaching assignments managed? Direct assignment by HOD or preference-based allocation?
questions.context: Preference-based creates a preference submission workflow before timetable generation

questions.question: How are courses allocated to faculty? Per semester manually, or auto-matched based on specialization?
questions.context: Auto-matching uses specialization tags and workload limits; hybrid allows manual override of auto suggestions

questions.question: What should faculty access via the portal? Mark entry, attendance, course materials, leave requests?
questions.context: Portal features need explicit controllers and access rules per feature; each adds development scope

questions.question: What contract types exist? Permanent, visiting, adjunct, part-time?
questions.context: Contract types affect workload norms, leave entitlements, and payroll calculations; selection field on hr.contract

context_hints: Faculty model often extends hr.employee -- check if HR module is in the project
Workload tracking feeds into timetable constraint satisfaction
Faculty portal is a major scope item -- confirm minimum viable features

questions.question: Should payroll integrate with Odoo's hr.payroll module for salary computation?
questions.context: Full integration uses hr.payslip with salary rules; basic only tracks net pay; standalone builds custom payroll

questions.question: What employee contract types are needed? Permanent, contractual, daily wage, visiting faculty?
questions.context: Contract types drive payroll rules, leave allocations, and benefit eligibility via hr.contract.type

questions.question: How is employee attendance tracked? Biometric device, manual entry, or both?
questions.context: Biometric needs device API integration (ZKTeco, etc.); manual uses hr.attendance check-in/out; both allows fallback

questions.question: How should overtime be calculated and compensated? Flat rate, multiplier-based, or comp-off?
questions.context: Multiplier uses work hours beyond threshold with configurable rate (1.5x, 2x); feeds into payroll salary rules

questions.question: Do you need department-wise payslip batching and approval?
questions.context: Department batching uses hr.payslip.run with department filter; enables HOD approval before finance processing

questions.question: Do you need employee loan and salary advance management?
questions.context: Loan model with installment schedule; auto-deducts from payslip via salary rule; tracks outstanding balance

questions.question: What employee document types need management? Contracts, certificates, ID copies, experience letters?
questions.context: Document types with expiry tracking and renewal reminders; uses ir.attachment with wrapper model

questions.question: Do you need probation period tracking with confirmation workflow?
questions.context: Probation adds date fields on hr.contract and a scheduled action for reminder; confirmation changes contract state

questions.question: Do you need periodic performance appraisal cycles? Annual, biannual, or custom?
questions.context: Appraisal cycles use hr.appraisal model or custom; can include self-assessment, manager review, and goal tracking

questions.question: Do you need leave encashment (converting unused leave to pay)?
questions.context: Leave encashment creates a payroll input from leave balance; needs encashment policy rules per leave type

context_hints: HR module may overlap with faculty module -- clarify boundary
Payroll rules are complex -- confirm minimum viable salary structure
Attendance integration with timetable enables automatic class attendance

questions.question: How should scheduling conflicts be handled? Hard constraints (must avoid) or soft preferences (try to avoid)?
questions.context: Hard constraints: no room/faculty/student double-booking; soft: minimize gaps, prefer morning slots, etc.

questions.question: How should rooms be allocated to classes? Manual assignment or auto-allocation based on capacity?
questions.context: Auto-allocation matches class size to room capacity; type-based also considers lab vs lecture vs seminar rooms

questions.question: What is the recurring pattern for classes? Weekly, bi-weekly, or custom patterns?
questions.context: Weekly is simplest (Mon-Sat slots); bi-weekly alternates weeks; custom needs a pattern definition model

questions.question: What is the time slot granularity? 30 minutes, 1 hour, or configurable?
questions.context: Granularity defines the minimum schedulable unit; configurable adds complexity but handles labs (2-3 hour blocks)

questions.question: Do you need faculty availability/preference input before timetable generation?
questions.context: Availability blocks time slots; preferences are soft constraints with weight; both gives best results but more input

questions.question: What room types need differentiation? Lecture hall, lab, seminar room, auditorium?
questions.context: Room types constrain which courses can be scheduled where; labs need specific equipment tracking

questions.question: How should faculty substitution be handled when a teacher is absent?
questions.context: Auto-suggest finds available faculty with matching specialization; manual requires HOD to assign

questions.question: How should timetables be published? Portal view, PDF export, or both?
questions.context: Portal view uses website controllers with role-based filtering; PDF uses QWeb report for printable version

questions.question: What entities should clash detection cover? Room + faculty, or room + faculty + student groups?
questions.context: Student group clash detection prevents scheduling two mandatory courses at the same time for the same batch/section

questions.question: Do you need timetable templates that can be reused across semesters?
questions.context: Templates save time on recurring schedules; duplicate and adjust rather than rebuild each semester

context_hints: Timetable depends on core (rooms, programs) and faculty (availability, workload)
Constraint satisfaction is computationally expensive -- consider async generation
Student batch/section grouping from student module feeds into clash detection

questions.question: What notification channels should be supported?
questions.context: Email uses mail.mail; SMS uses sms.sms; WhatsApp needs whatsapp module; push needs mobile app integration

questions.question: What template engine for notification content? QWeb (Odoo native), Jinja2, or plain text?
questions.context: QWeb integrates with Odoo's mail.template system and supports dynamic content with record data

questions.question: What events should auto-trigger notifications? Enrollment, fee due, exam results, attendance?
questions.context: Event triggers use Odoo's mail.activity or custom cron jobs; each trigger needs a template and recipient rule

questions.question: Do you need delivery status tracking (sent, delivered, failed, read)?
questions.context: Full tracking needs webhook callbacks from email/SMS providers; sent/failed uses Odoo's built-in mail state

questions.question: Do you need bulk notification sending? e.g., fee reminders to all students with outstanding balances.
questions.context: Bulk sending uses queue-based processing to avoid timeout; ir.cron with batch size limits

questions.question: Should notifications be sent immediately or support scheduling?
questions.context: Queued uses mail.mail queue processed by cron; scheduled adds a send_date field with future delivery

questions.question: How should recipients be resolved? Direct (student), indirect (student's guardian), or role-based (all HODs)?
questions.context: Indirect resolution follows relationships (student -> guardian); role-based queries security groups

questions.question: Do you need opt-out/preference management per channel?
questions.context: Per-channel opt-out uses a preference model with channel flags; respects GDPR/privacy requirements

questions.question: What retry policy for failed notifications? Immediate retry, exponential backoff, or no retry?
questions.context: Exponential backoff prevents provider rate limiting; configurable max retries and base delay

questions.question: How long should notification logs be retained? 30 days, 90 days, 1 year, or indefinite?
questions.context: Log retention affects database size; use ir.cron to purge old records; consider regulatory requirements

context_hints: Check config.json for notification_channels setting
Notification module is typically a service consumed by all other modules
WhatsApp integration requires the Odoo whatsapp module (v17+)

questions.question: What portal roles are needed? Student, faculty, parent/guardian, admin, or all?
questions.context: Each role needs its own portal.mixin integration, menu items, and access rules via res.groups

questions.question: What self-service features should the portal offer? View grades, pay fees, download documents, submit requests?
questions.context: Each self-service feature needs a portal controller, template, and appropriate security rules

questions.question: Should portal users be able to upload documents? What types and size limits?
questions.context: Document upload uses ir.attachment with file type and size validation; needs virus scanning consideration

questions.question: Is mobile responsiveness a requirement for the portal?
questions.context: Odoo's portal is Bootstrap-based and responsive by default; custom templates need responsive testing

questions.question: What dashboard widgets should be on the portal home? Upcoming exams, fee status, attendance, announcements?
questions.context: Dashboard widgets are portal template snippets with controller endpoints for dynamic data

questions.question: Do you need Single Sign-On (SSO) integration? LDAP, OAuth2, SAML?
questions.context: LDAP uses auth_ldap module; OAuth2/SAML need auth_oauth or custom provider; affects user provisioning

questions.question: What session timeout is appropriate for portal users?
questions.context: Session timeout configured via ir.config_parameter; shorter for security, longer for user convenience

questions.question: What password policy should apply to portal users? Minimum length, complexity, expiry?
questions.context: Basic: 8+ chars; moderate: 8+ with mixed case and numbers; strict: 12+ with special chars and 90-day expiry

questions.question: Do you need an announcement/notice board on the portal?
questions.context: Announcements model with publish/unpublish dates, target audience (role-based), and priority levels

questions.question: Do you need a feedback/grievance submission module on the portal?
questions.context: Feedback creates a record with category, description, and status tracking; grievance adds escalation workflow

context_hints: Portal module depends on all other modules for data exposure
Odoo's website module provides the portal framework -- ensure it is in base depends
Each portal feature needs explicit access rules to prevent data leakage

questions.question: What are the primary models this module will define and their relationships (Many2one, One2many, Many2many)?
questions.context: Start with the main model and its direct relationships; use dot notation for cross-module references

questions.question: What are the key workflows and their state transitions? e.g., draft -> confirmed -> done.
questions.context: State transitions use selection field with statusbar_widget; each transition can have server actions and constraints

questions.question: What security groups and access levels are needed? Manager, user, read-only?
questions.context: Groups defined in security/ir.model.access.csv and XML record rules; use implied_ids for group hierarchy

questions.question: What integration points exist with other modules in this ERP? Cross-model references, shared workflows?
questions.context: Integration points create inter-module dependencies; document which models are referenced from other modules

questions.question: What reports are needed? List views, pivot tables, graph views, PDF reports?
questions.context: Pivot and graph views use Odoo's built-in BI; PDF reports use QWeb templates with ir.actions.report

questions.question: Should any data from this module be exposed on the portal? Which models and what access level?
questions.context: Portal exposure requires portal.mixin inheritance, controllers, and access rules for portal users

questions.question: What automated tasks or cron jobs are needed? Scheduled reports, status updates, reminders?
questions.context: Cron jobs use ir.cron model; keep intervals reasonable (hourly minimum); consider performance impact

questions.question: Will you need to import/migrate existing data? What format and volume?
questions.context: CSV import uses Odoo's built-in import; API migration needs custom scripts; large volumes need batching

context_hints: Generic template is for modules that do not match any known type prefix
Ask follow-up questions based on the decomposition.json entry for this module
Check dependencies to understand integration scope
